items.title: Instagram will let users endlessly swap the audio on old posts
items.summary: There's a symbiotic - and sometimes frustrating - relationship between social media sites and the creators that depend on them. Platforms need influencers' and creators' content...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Instagram now lets you swap out the music in your old posts
items.summary: With the new "Replace Audio," tool, users can update the music on their post at any time while keeping the post's existing likes, comments, shares, and reach intact.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: A Sneaky Hacking Tool Targeting AI Infrastructure Is Lurking in Victims’ Blind Spots
items.summary: A new type of malware can worm deep into AI coding systems to steal data and logins—and can flip a “death switch” to destroy files and keep out real users.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
